ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lobbyists" (
  "lobbyist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lobbyist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the lobbyist */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the lobbying firm */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the lobbyist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the lobbyist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lobbyist */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the lobbyist registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the lobbyist (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lobbyist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "lobbyist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lobbyist who submitted the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was submitted */,
  "compensation" TEXT /* Total compensation received by the lobbyist */,
  "compensation_to_sub_lobbyist" TEXT /* Total compensation paid to sub-lobbyists */,
  "expenses" TEXT /* Total expenses incurred by the lobbyist */,
  "total_amount" TEXT /* Total amount reported, including compensation and expenses */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., quarterly, annual) */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the reporting period */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the reporting period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_lobbyist_id FOREIGN KEY ("lobbyist_id") REFERENCES lobbyists ("lobbyist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sub_lobbyists" (
  "sub_lobbyist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-lobbyist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-lobbyist */,
  "firm_name" TEXT /* Name of the lobbying firm */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the sub-lobbyist */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the sub-lobbyist */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the sub-lobbyist */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the sub-lobbyist registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the sub-lobbyist (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_lobbyist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments_to_sub_lobbyists" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report associated with the payment */,
  "sub_lobbyist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-lobbyist receiving the payment */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount paid to the sub-lobbyist */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, electronic transfer) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_to_sub_lobbyists_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_to_sub_lobbyists_sub_lobbyist_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_lobbyist_id") REFERENCES sub_lobbyists ("sub_lobbyist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report associated with the expense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the expense */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount spent on the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date the expense was incurred */,
  "expense_category" TEXT /* Category of the expense (e.g., travel, meals) */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor or service provider */,
  "receipt" TEXT /* File path or URL for the receipt */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_reports" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date the audit was conducted */,
  "findings" TEXT /* Findings from the audit */,
  "audit_type" TEXT /* Type of audit (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "auditor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the auditor who conducted the audit */,
  "audit_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_reports_auditor_id FOREIGN KEY ("auditor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., lobbyist, auditor, public) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the report */,
  "device_info" TEXT /* Information about the device used (e.g., browser, OS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)
